content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Blocking correctness gap: the change set is limited to run metadata journaling and does not deliver any of the mandated `ralph-burning-rlm` run-lifecycle fixes.

## Amendments

1. The diff introduces no runtime code changes for the lifecycle hardening work and therefore does not implement the requested behaviors. `git diff --name-only` includes only `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` (new events at lines 223-226) and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json` (new `stage_resolution_snapshot` block at lines 16-37), while no hunks exist in the required implementation files `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, or `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`. This leaves PID tracking, `run stop`, stale-state detection/recovery, and SIGTERM cleanup unimplemented, so acceptance criteria are unmet.
   Rationale: Without touching the engine/CLI/runtime code, the system will continue to expose stale `Running` states after process death and still lacks recovery and graceful shutdown paths.
